title: Create AGENTS.md — universal WAI bootstrap documentation
perceive: CLAUDE.md references AGENTS.md as mandatory step 2 of wakeup, but file does not exist at root level. Wakeup documentation chain is broken for new contributors and automated scripts.
execute: 1. Create /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/tracks/AGENTS.md documenting universal WAI bootstrap patterns.
2. Include sections: WAI Agent Types, Key Paths (WAI-Spoke, WAI-Harness, etc.), Session Lifecycle, Wakeup Protocol (cross-reference to CLAUDE.md), Spoke Architecture Overview.
3. Add cross-link from CLAUDE.md to AGENTS.md to establish two-way reference.
4. Verify AGENTS.md content aligns with wakeup sequence in CLAUDE.md (step 1 wakeup brief, step 2 WAI-State.json, step 3 commands/wai.md, step 4 seed/ingest/).
verify: AGENTS.md exists at root, contains sections on agent types and key paths, CLAUDE.md references it and is cross-linked.
acceptance_criteria: File created, documented clearly, linked from CLAUDE.md, no broken cross-references.
